summary: Verified Gender field addition to 'Create New Patient' form in MeetingDetailPage. All requirements met: Gender dropdown with Male/Female/Other options, positioned between MRN and Date of Birth fields, patient creation with Gender saves correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test patient 'GenderTest Patient' with MRN-GENDER-002 and Gender=Male
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gender field feature fully implemented and verified. Form layout: Row 1: First Name, Last Name | Row 2: MRN, Gender | Row 3: Date of Birth, Phone | Row 4: Diagnosis. Gender dropdown has options: Male, Female, Other. Gender is included in patient creation payload sent to backend.

gender_field_in_form.description: Gender field appears in 'Create New Patient' form
gender_field_in_form.evidence: Labels found in form: ['First Name *', 'Last Name *', 'MRN *', 'Gender', 'Date of Birth *', 'Phone Number', 'Diagnosis']

gender_dropdown_options.description: Gender dropdown has options: Male, Female, Other

gender_field_position.description: Gender field positioned between MRN and Date of Birth
gender_field_position.evidence: Screenshot shows form layout: Row 2 has MRN (left) and Gender (right), Row 3 has Date of Birth (left) and Phone Number (right)

patient_creation_with_gender.description: Creating a new patient with Gender saves correctly
patient_creation_with_gender.evidence: Patient 'GenderTest Patient' created with Gender=Male, patient count increased from 4 to 5
